meta.title: TheFarm.com — Product Demo
meta.tagline: Your Community, your Freedom, No judgment
meta.subtitle: The social network where wellness takes root.
meta.musicCredit: Folk / agriculture farm music (551390) — see /music license file
meta.notes: Cues are consumed by playwright.py. Each cue's `hold` is how long the demo pauses on that beat so a voiceover can read the `narration`. `caption` is burned onto the screen as an overlay. Total narration ~= the sum of all holds.

cues.caption: Your Community, your Freedom, No judgment.
cues.narration: This is TheFarm — the social network where wellness takes root. Your community, your freedom, no judgment.

cues.caption: Where wellness takes root
cues.narration: A calm, Twitter-style home for regenerative growers and the alternative-health brands they feed. Twelve thousand growers, ninety-eight percent publishing lab results, and zero creepy algorithms.

cues.caption: Built around trust, provenance, and community
cues.narration: We stripped out the outrage machine. Grow in public, prove your practices with real paperwork, build a farm-to-brand network, and enjoy a feed that's slower by design.

cues.caption: From seed to sale, in the open
cues.narration: Three simple steps: plant your story, prove your practices with certificates and lab tests, and grow a community that spreads by trust — not by an algorithm.

cues.caption: OAuth-ready for your storefront
cues.narration: For brands, TheFarm is your most honest storefront. Connect any store over an OAuth 2.0 API — the same foundation that powers Google and GitHub sign-in here.

cues.caption: Ready to put down roots?
cues.narration: Your first post is thirty seconds away. Let's sign in.

cues.caption: Sign in — email or social
cues.narration: Authentication ships built in. Email and password work out of the box, and Google, Apple, Facebook, and GitHub switch on automatically the moment you add credentials.

cues.caption: Social logins are wired and ready
cues.narration: Every social button is real. Until a provider's keys are configured, it explains exactly how to turn it on — no code changes required.

cues.caption: Any valid email + a 6-character password
cues.narration: For the demo, any valid email and a six-character password gets you in. We'll sign in as grower at thefarm dot com.

cues.caption: Welcome to The Field
cues.narration: This is The Field — the main feed, fresh from growers and brands across TheFarm.

cues.caption: Rich posts with an X-style photo grid
cues.narration: Posts carry text, tags, and media — up to four photos in a clean image grid, with certificates of analysis and sourcing right alongside the story.

cues.caption: Inline video, right in the feed
cues.narration: Video plays inline too — a single clip per post, with its own player, captured straight from the field.

cues.caption: What's growing now + suggested brands
cues.narration: A quiet sidebar surfaces trending tags and verified brands to follow — discovery without the noise.

cues.caption: Plant a post of your own
cues.narration: Let's plant a post. The composer counts your characters and lets you attach photos or a video before you share.

cues.caption: Your post lands at the top of the feed
cues.narration: Planted. Your post appears instantly at the top of the feed.

cues.caption: Water a post instead of liking it
cues.narration: Instead of a like, you water a post. It's an optimistic, one-tap gesture that spreads good work by trust.

cues.caption: A complete, wellness-appropriate legal suite
cues.narration: And because this is wellness, TheFarm ships a full legal suite — Terms, Privacy, Cookies, and an FDA-style wellness disclaimer, built for alternative-health content.

cues.caption: TheFarm.com — where wellness takes root.
cues.narration: That's TheFarm. Your community, your freedom, no judgment. Come put down roots.
